title: AI-Powered BA Workflow Automation
tagline: Automating Jira ticket creation and simplifying developer progress visibility
overview: A lightweight automation solution designed to simplify Business Analyst workflows by leveraging AI to generate structured Jira tickets and provide clear, non-technical explanations of development progress.
problem: Business Analysts had to manually create Jira tickets and often relied on developers to explain progress, causing delays, inconsistencies, and communication gaps.
solution: Initially planned as a full web platform, the approach was optimized mid-development for faster delivery. Implemented an AI-driven workflow using Cursor IDE with custom rules to enforce structured output formats. Integrated MCP to connect with Jira and GitHub, allowing AI-generated responses to be aligned with real development data while ensuring no direct system modifications were made.
outcome: Delivered a faster and more efficient solution that reduced manual effort in ticket creation and improved communication between technical and non-technical stakeholders.
impact: Reduced manual Jira ticket creation effort
Standardized requirement and task documentation format
Improved visibility of development progress for Business Analysts
Eliminated frequent dependency on developers for explanations

title: Electronic Document Management System (EDMS)
tagline: Enterprise document system with OCR, PDF editing, and secure access
overview: A full-featured document management system built for enterprise users to securely store, manage, and process documents.
problem: Organizations struggled with inefficient document handling, lack of centralized storage, and manual document processing workflows.
solution: Led a team of 3 developers to design and build an EDMS with OCR processing, PDF editing capabilities, and LDAP-based authentication for secure access.
outcome: Significantly improved document accessibility, reduced manual processing time, and enhanced security for enterprise document workflows.

title: Helpdesk Management System (HECS)
tagline: Centralized issue tracking system for internal support teams
overview: A web-based helpdesk system designed to manage internal support requests and streamline issue resolution processes.
problem: Support requests were scattered and unmanaged, causing delays and lack of visibility into issue status.
solution: Designed and developed a centralized helpdesk system with structured ticketing, status tracking, and reporting features.
outcome: Improved response time, better issue tracking, and increased transparency across support operations.

title: Call Center Management System (CCS)
tagline: System maintenance and enhancement for daily operations
overview: An enterprise call center system used daily for managing customer interactions and operational workflows.
problem: System stability issues and production bugs affected daily operations and user productivity.
solution: Maintained and enhanced the system by resolving production issues, optimizing performance, and ensuring system reliability.
outcome: Improved system stability and ensured smooth daily operations for users relying on the platform.
